learning.concept: An algorithm is a step-by-step solution to a problem.
learning.explanation: Algorithms don't have to be complex. Any sequence of steps to reach a goal is an algorithm. Programming is simply writing these steps clearly for a computer.

analogy.title: Google Maps Route
analogy.body:
The way Google Maps calculates your route is an algorithm:

1. Find start point
2. Find end point
3. Calculate fastest path
4. Show the route

👉 That’s a sequence that solves a problem.

practice.q: Steps to login to an app?
practice.a: 1. Enter username | 2. Enter password | 3. Press login button.
1. Wash rice | 2. Add water | 3. Boil until cooked.
1. Look at numbers | 2. Apply operator (+ or -) | 3. Write result.
